+-----------------[  Output Stage  ]+------------------[  Transform Stage  ]+    +----------------[  Input Stage  ]+
|                                   |                                       |    |                                 |
| +---------+        +----------+   |  +-----------+        +------------+  |    |  +---------+        +--------+  |
| |  Write  |<-------+  Format  |<--o--+  Convert  |<-------+  Validate  |<-o----o--+  Parse  |<-------+  Read  |  |
| +---------+        +----------+   |  +-----------+        +------------+  |    |  +---------+        +--------+  |
|                                   |                                       |    |                                 |
|                                   |                                       |    |                                 |
|                                   |                                       |    |                                 |
+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------------+    +---------------------------------+
